subcodes.title: Interview with five American teachers, Haifa, 1914-07-21
subcodes.first_line: They teach that the internal, spiritual idea is the same in all the religions; that a unique general plan underlies the foundation of the past faiths
subcodes.subjects: @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @oneness; unity of religion, @priestcraft, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
